history.title: Why Do You Seek Freedom?
history.description: "Why Do You Seek Freedom? May 9, 2013223 0 1 5 0 Like Colin Bondi, Contributor Waking Times There are an endless number of things to want in this world. Desires are endless because when one desire is satisfied soon another rises to take its place, continuing the cycle of wanting. Human life is usual
